revision.text:
{{Commonscat}} {{category explanation|'''[[:en:Androgyny|androgynous]]''' and '''[[Hermaphrodite|hermaphroditic]]''' deities in religion and mythology}} {{Cat more|LGBT themes in mythology|LGBT themes in classical mythology[[Category:redirect categories]]Androgynes and intersex}}
[[Category:Gender and religion]] [[Category:Intersex topics in religion and mythology|deities]] [[Category:Deities by type|-hermaphrodites]] [[Category:Transgender topics and religion]] [[Category:Transgender topics and mythology]] [[en:Category:Androgynous and hermaphroditic deities]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
